title: Vetting a GMP Audit Consultant
alt: Checklist of what to verify before appointing a GMP audit consultant

items.label: Relevant GMP background
items.desc: Hands-on QP, QA/QC or production history in your dosage forms

items.label: Current lead auditor
items.desc: ISO 19011 training plus audits led in the last 12 months

items.label: Framework fluency
items.desc: EU GMP, ICH Q9/Q10 and, where relevant, 21 CFR 210/211

items.label: Genuine independence
items.desc: No conflict of interest with the audited party

items.label: Risk-based method
items.desc: Effort follows risk; findings graded and evidenced

items.label: Reports & CAPA support
items.desc: Clear reporting that moves you towards closure
